message:
fix(doc): enable 6 previously-ignored doc tests that compile correctly

explanations (3 tests), plan, recorder_audit, and logging::wa_span all
have proper `use` imports and compile+run successfully. Removed
unnecessary `ignore` annotations. Also normalized `rust,ignore` → `ignore`
in learn.rs, retry.rs, screen_state.rs (equivalent, just format consistency).

Doc test results: 32 passed, 0 failed (up from 26).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
